Soil/Rock Description: Angular COBBLES and GRAVELS of moderately decomposed granite with some brown silty SAND and some concrete fragments. (FILL)
Sub-rounded COBBLES and GRAVELS of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some grey silty sand. (ALLUVIUM)

Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with medium to closely spaced, extremely narrow to very narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained and kaolin coated joints, dipping 10°-20° and 70°-80°.
